purpose: Verified per-state top 20 community-led organisations with ABN, community-control flag, website, ALMA score, recent state funding (QLD only). Each org classified by linkage_strength so the weak-linkage ones can be flagged for outreach.

linkage_legend.strong_linkage: Has ALMA youth-justice intervention with score — evidence-backed
linkage_legend.moderate_linkage: Has ALMA intervention (any category) — scored but not youth-justice-specific
linkage_legend.funded_no_alma: Received state youth-justice funding FY24-26 but no ALMA record — funded but under-documented
linkage_legend.weak_linkage_with_website: No ALMA + no recent funding record but has website — can be researched before contact
linkage_legend.weak_linkage_no_contact: No ALMA + no funding + no website — needs phone-directory / ABN-lookup outreach

contact_enrichment_gap.note: Email + phone fields are unpopulated across all 8,826 community-controlled orgs. ACNC has public email for registered charities — post-envelope enrichment task. For Session 1 outreach, use website where available + ABN Lookup + phone directory.

qld_funding_note: justice_funding table contains QLD program-level detail for FY24-26 (43 community-controlled recipients, $280K–$44M range). Other states (NSW, VIC, WA, SA, TAS, NT, ACT) have sparse or no funding data in this period. QLD is the evidence-strongest state for funded-verification.
